layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense content and data. Optical alignment for icons in buttons.

components_strategy.buttons: Solid primary background with white text. Hover state must be lighter hue. Focus state must have 2px offset ring.
components_strategy.cards: Flat background (#141E3A) with 1px solid border (#28385E). On hover, border color shifts to #00A8E8 and card lifts slightly (-translate-y-1).
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn input components customized with #141E3A background, #28385E border, white text. Focus state changes border to #00A8E8.
components_strategy.tables: Dense rows, no background striping. 1px bottom border for rows. Header uses label typography.
components_strategy.modals: Backdrop blur. Dark blue background. 1px border. Close button top right.
components_strategy.navigation: Sticky sidebar (left) for dashboard, or top nav with glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0B132B]/70 border-b border-[#28385E]).
components_strategy.badges: For verification: bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/20.

motion_and_interactions.entrance_animation: opacity-0 translate-y-4 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-500
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Use for 'Verified Labours' or 'Live Projects' feed. Slow, continuous scroll.

images.description: Blueprint style dark architectural background, useful for hero section or auth page background with low opacity overlay.
Male construction worker in hard hat.
Worker with yellow hard hat outdoors.
Male worker wearing red hard hat.
Scissor lifts for tool rental marketplace.
Worker holding a drill, suitable for tool rental listing.

accessibility.contrast_ratio: Ensure text contrast is at least 4.5:1 against dark blue backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring.
accessibility.testing: All key elements must include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layouts and heavily customized Shadcn components for complex interactions.
Ensure all dashboard charts (if any) use the dark blue and light blue color palette.
Implement the Control Room Grid pattern for dashboard widgets, ensuring tight gaps and maximized space usage.
Never use generic placeholder images. Use the provided image URLs strictly mapped to their categories.
Include hover and active state styles explicitly for all buttons and interactive elements.
Use data-testid on all interactive elements.
Apply 'tracking-tight' for headers to make them look modern and authoritative.
Keep text readable. Don't use fonts smaller than text-xs.
When a user logs in, direct them to a role-based dashboard view (Employer, Labour, Admin).
